issues.description: Missing static ability: 'If your Leader is multicolored, this Character gains [Blocker].' This is a permanent conditional effect that must be represented separately from the On Play trigger.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect specifies 'Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Onigashima Island]' but the DSL only searches without specifying the 5-card limitation and reveal mechanic. Should include proper deck look/reveal logic.
PlayFromHand filter is too broad. Should specify filter by name 'Onigashima Island' and limit to 1 card ('up to 1'). Current filter only checks cardType 'Stage' which is insufficient.
Missing action for 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' - this deck arrangement step is not represented in the DSL.
